span_mappings.nl_span: all 81 states partitioned into Cosmos (72), Satellite (8), Singularity (1)

formal_statement:
theorem qa_orbit_partition :
    qa_cosmos ∪ qa_satellite ∪ qa_singularity = Finset.univ
natural_language_claim: The 81 states of ZMod 9 × ZMod 9 are partitioned exactly into Cosmos (72 states), Satellite (8 states), and Singularity (1 state): every QA mod-9 state belongs to exactly one orbit.
